title: Palantir Software Engineer Salary | Levels.fyi
note: WebFetch-confirmed. Company-wide (not level-specific) Software Engineer comp including Forward Deployed Software Engineer: total comp median $255K, base $175K, stock $70.4K/yr, bonus $5K. Cited as an outlier data point for this tier, not a clean L1 anchor — Palantir pays well above typical high-growth-public peers (Axon/Cisco/GitLab/Samsara).
